data.name: My Shameless StepMom
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the captivating world of intrigue and mysteries in the visual novel for adults My Shameless StepMom! Embark on an exciting journey with the main character, Dylan, who finds himself in the midst of tangled family and professional intrigues.

After his father mysteriously disappears, Dylan is left with a new "family" - a stepmother and a step-sister, ripe for investigation. From the hostile wife of his father to the criminally inclined waitress at his favorite café, each character has their own secrets and motives that could reveal the truth about the disappearance.

With complex relationships between characters, an intriguing plot, and detective elements, set out to find the truth with Dylan. Can he find common ground with his stepmother and step-sister? And what really happened to his father?

My Shameless StepMom not only offers a visually captivating story but also contains adult content, adding depth and realism to the game. Get ready for an exciting journey where every decision you make can change the course of events.

Features:
  • An immersive storyline filled with emotional twists and moments that will make your heart race.
  • Intuitive gameplay that celebrates and rewards your imaginative flair.
  • Diverse characters, each with unique personality traits and backgrounds, making your journey even more intriguing.
  • Immerse yourself in real-time 3D characters and animations.
  • A large variety of animated scenes for the different poses and positions!
  • Ability to play with one hand. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

data.short_description: Welcome to the captivating world of intrigue and mysteries in the visual novel for adults My Shameless StepMom! Embark on an exciting journey with the main character, Dylan, who finds himself in the midst of tangled family and professional intrigues.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
